---
title: 'Gaylord Texan Hotel'
date: '2014-01-27T05:00:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5642258515695444299'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/gaylord-texan-hotel.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Enjoy'
  - 'Discover'
---

<h3 style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.marriott.com/hotels/travel/dalgt-gaylord-texan-resort-and-convention-center/" target="_blank">Gaylord Texan Hotel</a></h3><div><h3 style="text-align: center;"><a href="http://www.grapevinetexasusa.com/" target="_blank">Grapevine Texas</a></h3><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"></div><br /><h4>Rating (5 Being the Best)</h4><h4><div style="font-weight: normal;">3.9</div><div style="font-weight: normal;"><br /></div></h4><h4>Overview</h4><a href="http://cache.marriott.com/propertyimages/d/dalgt/phototour/dalgt_phototour06.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" src="http://cache.marriott.com/propertyimages/d/dalgt/phototour/dalgt_phototour06.jpg" height="221" width="320" /></a>I actually didn't stay here, although I'm sure the rooms are great and I plan to do a "Stay-cation" here someday after visiting. I was actually just coming in for an interview for a job that I decided wasn't a good fit for where I am in life right now. But after having visited, I felt the need to share it with you.<br /><br />Parking in the garage is paid parking, even if you are just coming in for a quick bit to eat or go to an interview. You walk inside the front door and are greeted by a beautiful lobby. But that's just the start. You walk past the lobby into a fully enclosed atrium.<br /><br /><div style="text-align: right;"></div>The high glass ceilings allow sunlight in without letting the cold of winter in. We were visiting when it was 30*F outside and inside this atrium it was 75-80*f. There are flowers, trees, and streams inside. A large miniature train display. There is a walk way descending next to a river leading to a fountain blowing high into the air. The feel of much of the architecture is ancient, but the entire place has a certain class.<br /><br />I find myself wanting to go there, buy lunch and sip coffee by the streams. Which I would on a regular basis if parking wasn't paid. That part irks me. In fact, it's the paid parking that makes me say 3.9 and not 4+ for rating.<br /><br /><h4>Cost</h4>The parking was $12 from 0 Minutes<br /><br />As of today, they are quoting prices of about $170-$300 a night. As far as resorts go, that's not bad.<br /><br /><h4>Kids</h4>The kids really enjoyed walking around, seeing the river inside of the Lobby, and visiting the gift shops.<br /><br /><h4>Final Thoughts</h4>I'll probably update this once I either stay here, or a close friend or family member stays here. My thoughts for now, are that I would be happy to make this a place to go!<br /><br /><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" class="tr-caption-container" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; text-align: center;"><tbody><tr><td style="text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140115-152401-6786e7a69f6f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto;"><img alt="Lego Model of Gaylord Texan Hotel" border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-20140115-152401-6786e7a69f6f.jpg" height="239" title="Lego Model of Gaylord Texan Hotel" width="320" /></a></td></tr><tr><td class="tr-caption" style="text-align: center;">Lego Model of Gaylord Texan Hotel</td></tr></tbody></table><br /><h4><a href="flickr: LIF Master Set" target="_blank">Flickr Photos</a></h4><div style="text-align: center;"><iframe align="center" frameborder="0" height="500" scrolling="no" src="http://www.flickr.com/slideShow/index.gne?group_id=&amp;user_id=106439236@N07&amp;set_id=72157640084706074&amp;tags=Food,Entertainment,FortWorth" width="500"></iframe><br /></div><div style="text-align: center;"><small>Created with&nbsp;<a href="http://www.admarket.se/" title="Admarket.se">Admarket's</a>&nbsp;<a href="http://flickrslidr.com/" title="flickrSLiDR">flickrSLiDR</a>.</small></div><br /><h4>As Seen On:</h4><div><h4>Flickr:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.flickr.com/photos/darrellwolfe/sets/72157639481468746/" target="_blank">LIF Master Set</a></h4></div><h4></h4><h4>Urban Spoon:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/br/13/6359/life-in-fort-worth-dallas-fort-worth" target="_blank">Life In Fort Worth</a></h4><h4>Yelp:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.yelp.com/biz/gaylord-texan-grapevine#hrid:NVIz9zuBlUNmyMMn7tEtxg" target="_blank">LifeInFortWorth.Yelp.Com</a></h4><h4></h4><br /><br />Please comment below if you have anything to add, say, or correct.<br /><br /><b>Life In Fort Worth by&nbsp;</b><b><span style="font-size: x-small;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></b><br /><b><span style="font-size: x-small;"><br /></span></b><b>Disclosure of Material Connection: Some of the links in the post above are â€œaffiliate links.â€ This means if you click on the link and purchase the item, I will receive an affiliate commission. I may also have received one or more of the products or services mentioned above for free in the hope that I would mention it on my blog. Regardless, I only recommend products or services I use personally and believe will add value to my readers. I am disclosing this in accordance with the Federal Trade Commissionâ€™s&nbsp;<a href="http://www.gpo.gov/fdsys/pkg/CFR-2003-title16-vol1/content-detail.html" target="_blank">16 CFR, Part 255</a>: â€œGuides Concerning the Use of Endorsements and Testimonials in Advertising.â€ A Big Thank You to&nbsp;<a href="http://michaelhyatt.com/five-ways-to-comply-with-the-new-ftc-guidelines-for-bloggers.html" target="_blank">Michael Hyatt</a>&nbsp;for helping us Bloggers with these new legal disclosure requirements.&nbsp;</b><br /><h4>Blog:</h4><ul><li><a href="http://www.lifeinfortworth.com/" target="_blank">www.LifeInFortWorth.com</a></li><li><a href="https://www.facebook.com/LifeInFortWorth" target="_blank">Facebook.Com/LifeInFortWorth</a></li><li><a href="http://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe" target="_blank">Twitter.Com/DarrellWolfe</a></li></ul><h4>Connect:</h4><div style="clear: both; float: left; padding-bottom: 10px;"><a href="https://www.facebook.com/DarrellGWolfe" imageanchor="1"><img alt="Follow me on Facebook" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/facebook-icon-436ed0b74b58.png" style="border: 0px; height: 32px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 32px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe"><img alt="Follow  &lt;b&gt;YOUR-TWITTER-ACCOUNT-NAME&lt;/b&gt; on Twitter" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/twitter-logo-0d130abda9d2.png" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://www.youtube.com/user/darrellgwolfe"><img alt="Follow YOUR-CHANNEL-ID on YouTube" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/youtube-icon-df42b17a5900.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a><a href="http://feeds.feedburner.com/TexasLivingInfo" rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml"><img alt="RSS subscription icon" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/rss-logo-d57cc3305733.jpg" style="border: 0px; height: 33px; margin-left: 5px; margin-right: 5px; width: 33px;" />&nbsp;</a>&nbsp;&nbsp; </div><br /><br /><h4><b>What is YOUR favorite place to go? Comment Below!</b></h4></div>
